info.title: WeGotWorkspace API
info.description: Parallel OpenAPI-first REST API for all app domains.

mayRead.description: May fetch cards in this address book.

mayWrite.description: May create, update, delete, or move cards.

mayDelete.description: May delete the address book itself.

sortOrder.description: UI sort order; lower values appear first.

isSubscribed.description: Whether the book is shown in client UI.

shareWith.description: Principal id to rights map; null when not shared.

myRights.description: Current user's access rights for this book.

@type.description: JSContact Card type discriminator (server-set on responses).

addressBookIds.description: Set of address book ids; each value MUST be true.

uid.description: Cross-system card identifier (RFC 9553; optional in JSContact 2.0 per RFC 9982). Required for JMAP Contacts (RFC 9610).

members.description: Group member uids when kind is group.

vCardProps.description: RFC 9555 unmapped vCard properties (conversion base spec; uid rules updated by RFC 9982 for JSContact 2.0).

ContactCard.description: RFC 9610 ContactCard — full JMAP ContactCard returned by GET/POST/PUT responses. Server-owned `id`, `@type`, and `version` are read-only; use ContactCardCreate for POST/PUT request bodies.

JsContactAddress.description: RFC 9553 Address — at least one of components, coordinates, countryCode, full, or timeZone MUST be set.

JsContactIdAddressMap.description: RFC 9553 addresses map — nested `@type` on values and AddressComponent entries is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdSchedulingAddressMap.description: RFC 9553 schedulingAddresses map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

number.description: tel:, sip:, or free-text phone number.

features.description: Feature flags: mobile, voice, text, video, main-number, textphone, fax, pager.

JsContactOnlineService.description: RFC 9553 OnlineService — at least one of uri or user MUST be set.

JsContactIdEmailAddressMap.description: RFC 9553 emails map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdPhoneMap.description: RFC 9553 phones map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdOnlineServiceMap.description: RFC 9553 onlineServices map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdLanguagePrefMap.description: RFC 9553 preferredLanguages map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

relation.description: Relation types: acquaintance, agent, child, co-resident, co-worker, colleague, contact, crush, date, emergency, friend, kin, me, met, muse, neighbor, parent, sibling, spouse, sweetheart.

JsContactAuthor.description: RFC 9553 Author — at least one of name or uri MUST be set.

JsContactIdAnniversaryMap.description: RFC 9553 anniversaries map — nested `@type` on values, date, and place is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdNoteMap.description: RFC 9553 notes map — nested `@type` on values and author is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdPersonalInfoMap.description: RFC 9553 personalInfo map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactName.description: RFC 9553 Name — at least one of components or full MUST be set.

JsContactOrganization.description: RFC 9553 Organization — at least one of name or units MUST be set.

JsContactSpeakToAs.description: RFC 9553 SpeakToAs — at least one of grammaticalGender or pronouns MUST be set.

JsContactIdNicknameMap.description: RFC 9553 nicknames map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdOrganizationMap.description: RFC 9553 organizations map — nested `@type` on values and OrgUnit entries is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdTitleMap.description: RFC 9553 titles map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

blobId.description: JMAP blob id (RFC 9610); replaces data: URI on read.

JsContactMedia.description: RFC 9553 Media with JMAP blobId extension.

JsContactIdCalendarMap.description: RFC 9553 calendars map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdCryptoKeyMap.description: RFC 9553 cryptoKeys map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdDirectoryMap.description: RFC 9553 directories map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdLinkMap.description: RFC 9553 links map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactIdMediaMap.description: RFC 9553 media map — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactId.description: RFC 9553 Id — base64url alphabet without padding.

JsContactUTCDateTime.description: RFC 9553 UTCDateTime — RFC 3339 date-time with Z offset.

JsContactIdBooleanMap.description: RFC 9553 Id[Boolean] set keyed by JsContact Id (addressBookIds, members). Nested `@type` not applicable.

JsContactStringRelationMap.description: RFC 9553 String[Relation] map (relatedTo) — nested `@type` on values is optional (RFC 9553 §1.3.4).

JsContactJCardProp.description: RFC 9555 JCardProp — jCard property tuple [name, params, valueType, value].

addressBookIds.description: Set of address book ids; each value MUST be true.

uid.description: Cross-system card identifier (RFC 9553). Optional on create; server generates when omitted.

members.description: Group member uids when kind is group.

ContactCardCreate.description: POST/PUT request body for contact cards. Omits server-owned `id`, `@type`, and `version`. Nested `@type` on map values is optional per RFC 9553 §1.3.4.

addressBookIds.description: Set of address book ids; each value MUST be true. Map entry null removes membership.

members.description: Group member uids when kind is group. Map entry null removes member.

ContactCardPatch.description: PATCH request body for partial contact card updates. Omits server-owned `id`, `@type`, and `version`. Id-keyed map entries merge by key; null removes an entry. Nested objects (e.g. name) deep-merge.

recurrenceId.description: Original instance start for expanded or override rows; null on series masters.

recurrenceRules.description: RRULE on series masters; null on expanded instances.

recurrenceOverrides.description: Per-instance patches keyed by recurrence id (original instance start). Maps to RECURRENCE-ID override VEVENTs in ICS.

alerts.description: Reminder alarms mapped from iCalendar VALARM components.

CalendarEvent.description: JMAP CalendarEvent mapped from a single VEVENT ICS resource.

CalendarEventCreate.description: POST body; server assigns id and @type.

JmapId.description: JMAP id string (calendar uri, event id, map key).

JmapIdBooleanMap.description: Map of ids to true booleans.

JmapLocalDateTime.description: Local or UTC date-time without required Z suffix.

recurrenceRules.description: RRULE-only; clients expand instances per JMAP Tasks draft.

excludedRecurrenceDates.description: EXDATE values for excluded recurrence instances.

recurrenceOverrides.description: Per-instance patches keyed by recurrence id (RECURRENCE-ID).

alerts.description: Task reminders mapped from VALARM components.

icsProps.description: Unmapped VTODO properties preserved for round-trip fidelity.

recurrenceOverrides.description: Per-instance patches keyed by recurrence id (original instance start). Maps to RECURRENCE-ID override VEVENTs in ICS.

alerts.description: Reminder alarms mapped from iCalendar VALARM components.

CalendarEventPatch.description: PATCH request body for partial calendar event updates. Omits server-owned id and @type.

relativeTo.description: Relative to task start (DTSTART) or end/due (DUE)

when.description: UTC date-time when the alert fires

excluded.description: When true, exclude this recurrence instance (EXDATE)

DavEtag.description: Quoted HTTP entity tag aligned with Cal/CardDAV storage (Sabre PDO etag).

CalendarEventRecurrenceOverride.description: Per-instance patch keyed by recurrence id (original instance start). Use excluded:true to omit an instance.

offset.description: Signed ISO 8601 duration relative to event start or end (e.g. -PT15M).

id.description: Optional client-suggested address book id (uri slug).

onDestroyRemoveContents.description: When true, delete all cards in the book before destroying it.

oldState.description: Previous sync state token supplied by the client.

newState.description: Current sync state token to store for the next request.

IfMatchHeader.name: If-Match
IfMatchHeader.description: Concurrency token from the prior GET ETag header or etag response field.

IfUnmodifiedSinceHeader.name: If-Unmodified-Since
IfUnmodifiedSinceHeader.description: Optional fallback when If-Match is omitted; compared to stored lastmodified.

post.summary: Issue RS256 bearer token from username/password
Refresh access token using refresh token
Revoke current access token and/or refresh token

put.summary: Update profile details for current user
Update personal mail credentials for current user

patch.summary: Patch read/starred flags on a message

post.summary: Delete one or more drive items

get.summary: List starred drive paths for current user

post.summary: Set starred state for a drive path

get.summary: Notes runtime boot state for authenticated user
List notes with optional archive/notebook/search filters

post.summary: Establish browser UI session cookie for a plugin surface

get.summary: Installer summary and current state snapshot

post.summary: Probe or resolve meet room metadata

patch.summary: Rename or move file or directory

destination.description: Target parent directory; omit to rename in place

get.summary: List contact cards in an address book

patch.description: Deep-merge patch into the existing JSContact Card. Id-keyed map entries merge by key; null removes an entry.

get.summary: List calendar events in a calendar

parameters.name: expandRecurrences
parameters.description: Expand recurring events into instances in the requested window (requires after and before).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Window start (required when expandRecurrences is true).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Window end (required when expandRecurrences is true).

get.summary: List tasks in a task list

get.description: JMAP AddressBook/changes REST mapping. See docs/contacts/jmap-sync-rest-mapping.md.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Previous state token; omit or `0` for initial sync.

get.summary: Incremental contact card changes in an address book
get.description: JMAP ContactCard/changes REST mapping backed by CardDAV synctoken.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Previous synctoken; omit or `0` for initial sync.

post.summary: Query contact card ids by filter
post.description: JMAP ContactCard/query REST mapping (MVP: inAddressBook + uid).
